description.title: Bespoke Garden Summer House
description.text: This project involved the bespoke design and construction of a garden summer house, created by our team to meet the client’s exact requirements. The building was fully custom-made, with careful consideration given to proportions, functionality and overall style.

Our team completed everything from the main structure to the internal finishes. Large panoramic aluminium sliding doors bring generous natural light, strengthening the connection between the interior and the garden.

Internally, the space includes a comfortable seating area and a compact kitchenette with a timber worktop and carefully selected finishes. A separate shower room was also incorporated, designed in a clean, modern, minimalist style.

description.title: Project Features
description.text:
• Fully bespoke design and construction
  • Contemporary minimalist appearance
  • Panoramic aluminium sliding doors
  • Natural timber façade finish
  • Compact kitchenette with timber worktop
  • Comfortable relaxation area
  • Modern shower room
The project demonstrates our approach: attention to detail, quality materials and tailored solutions shaped around each client.

constructionProcess.intro: Key stages of the bespoke garden room: from the existing garden and slab groundwork through timber framing, insulation and cladding, to plasterboard, glazing and final exterior details.

description.title: Rear Extension
description.text: This project involved the construction of a new rear extension and the reconfiguration of part of the existing house to create a modern open-plan living space. Our team carried out all works, from demolition of the existing structures through to the final interior finishes.
Throughout the build, we maintained quality control at every stage and worked in ongoing coordination with Building Control to ensure that all works complied with current UK Building Regulations.

The new extension created a spacious, open-plan kitchen with an island, a dining area, and a seating area, with large panoramic sliding doors that provide direct access to the garden and bring generous natural light into the space.

description.title: Preparation and Demolition
description.text:
• Removal of the existing kitchen and internal partitions
  • Preparation of the site
  • Waste removal and site clearance

description.title: Extension Construction
description.text:
• Excavation and concrete foundations
  • Construction of new external walls
  • Roof structure installation
  • Installation of new energy-efficient windows
  • Installation of large sliding doors to the garden
  • Installation of rooflights

description.title: Building Services and Flooring
description.text:
• Installation of wet underfloor heating
  • Concrete screed
  • Installation of new flooring
  • New electrical and lighting system
  • New heating system

description.title: Internal Works
description.text:
• Creation of a spacious open-plan kitchen with an island
  • Formation of a dining area
  • Installation of a new ground-floor bathroom
  • Full refurbishment of the first-floor bathroom
  • Plastering and painting
  • Interior finishing works

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed project gave the house a spacious, modern, open-plan layout, bringing together the kitchen, dining and seating areas into one coherent living space. Large panoramic doors provide generous natural light and create a smooth connection between the interior and the garden.

constructionProcess.intro: These photos follow the key on-site stages—from initial preparation and strip-out through first fix to decorating—so you can see how the extension took shape before the finished space in the portfolio below.

description.title: Full Apartment Renovation
description.text: This project involved the full renovation of a third-floor apartment, with a complete upgrade of the interior, building services and overall layout. Our team carried out a full strip-out of the existing finishes, flooring, kitchen and part of the internal partitioning, after which the apartment was fully renovated in line with the client’s brief.

One of the key elements of the project was the reconfiguration of the kitchen, which included removing the wall between the kitchen and dining area and installing a structural steel beam in accordance with the engineering drawings. This allowed the space to be opened up and reorganised into a more practical and modern layout.

description.title: Strip-Out and Preparation
description.text:
• Removal of the existing kitchen and flooring
  • Demolition of the wall between the kitchen and dining area
  • Removal of old internal finishes
  • Waste removal and site clearance

description.title: New Building Services
description.text:
• Full electrical rewire throughout the apartment
  • New wiring, sockets, switches and lighting
  • New heating system throughout
  • Installation of new radiators and pipework
  • New plumbing and drainage system

description.title: Kitchen
description.text:
• Installation of a new kitchen
  • Fitting of kitchen units and worktops
  • Appliance connections
  • Tiling above the work surfaces
  • Installation of new kitchen flooring

description.title: Bespoke Joinery
description.text:
• Full refurbishment of the existing bathroom
  • Installation of new sanitaryware
  • Integration of new plumbing and electrical connections

description.title: Bathroom
description.text:
• Full renovation of the shower room
  • New sanitaryware
  • Waterproofing works
  • Wall and floor tiling
  • Installation of the shower area, basin and associated fittings

description.title: Internal Finishes
description.text:

  • New skirting boards
  • New door linings and doors
  • Plastering works
  • Full decoration throughout

description.title: Balcony
description.text:

description.title: The result
description.text: The result was a fully renovated apartment with upgraded services, a more functional layout, and bespoke joinery, creating a modern, practical living space.

constructionProcess.intro: Replace this text and add stages with photos in content/projects.json. The section appears before “The result” when at least one image is listed.

description.title: Historic Building Renovation
description.text: This project breathed new life into a historic building, carefully balancing preservation of its unique character with thoughtful modernisation for contemporary use.

The works required careful restoration of existing features, including original doors and architectural details, alongside the introduction of new elements where appropriate. A bespoke kitchen and bathroom were installed, and a custom staircase was fabricated to suit the building’s character. Flooring was selected to remain in keeping with the original style while incorporating modern improvements in performance and finish.
We coordinated closely with designers and specialist trades to ensure the completed works remained consistent with the building's architectural identity.

description.title: Scope of Works
description.text:
• Restoration of original architectural features
  • Structural and internal renovation works
  • Bespoke kitchen installation
  • Bespoke bathroom installation
  • Fabrication and installation of a custom staircase
  • Flooring in keeping with the existing style
  • Upgrades to plumbing and electrical systems
  • Integration of modern insulation
  • Internal finishing and detailing

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed renovation preserves the building’s original character and improves comfort, functionality, and long-term usability.

constructionProcess.intro: A short walk through the job: from strip-out and new heated subfloors to herringbone brick flooring, a full kitchen fit-out in the open-plan living space, and careful finishing — including protected works overhead and precise bathroom tiling that suits the building’s historic character.

description.title: Full Apartment Renovation
description.text: This project involved the full renovation of a London apartment, combining structural improvements with updated interior finishes.

The works included internal alterations, strengthening of floor structures and the full replacement of electrical and plumbing systems. Underfloor heating and acoustic soundproofing were also installed to improve comfort and overall performance.
The kitchen and bathroom were redesigned and rebuilt, while original-style windows were carefully restored to retain the property's character.

description.title: Scope of Works
description.text:
• Internal alterations and layout changes
  • Structural floor strengthening
  • Full electrical installation
  • New plumbing system
  • Installation of underfloor heating
  • Acoustic soundproofing
  • Kitchen installation
  • Bathroom installation
  • Restoration of original windows
  • Internal finishes and decoration

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed apartment is a well-finished home that combines modern systems with more considered design details and improved day-to-day comfort.

constructionProcess.intro: Process timeline for Bayswater apartment renovation, from initial condition and strip-out through rebuild, bathroom works, and kitchen installation.

description.title: Office Building Redevelopment
description.text: One of our recent projects involved transforming a seven-storey former school building that had stood vacant for 8 years into a modern office building. DS5 Construction Ltd took full responsibility for this ambitious redevelopment, bringing the property back into use and upgrading it to meet current commercial standards.
The result is a collection of contemporary, functional office suites on all seven floors, tailored to accommodate diverse businesses.

The project began with strip-out and demolition works, including the removal of outdated partitions and sanitary installations that no longer met current requirements. We then reinstated key services, including the gas supply and electrical systems, while also developing a new internal layout designed around the client’s current and future needs.

Our construction team managed every stage of the redevelopment. This included installing new walls, floors, and ceilings, reconstructing the staircase, and installing new balustrades. We also delivered modern washroom facilities, changing areas, office rooms and a fully fitted kitchen, creating a practical and well-organised working environment throughout the building.

All works were carried out in line with the project plans, under close project management, and in accordance with current construction and design standards. The programme was carefully controlled to ensure that each stage was completed on schedule.

After 12 weeks of intensive work, the building was successfully transformed into a functional and visually coherent office environment, providing a modern setting for business activity and future growth.

description.title: Scope of Works
description.text:
• Strip-out and demolition of outdated internal elements
  • Removal of obsolete sanitary installations
  • Reinstatement of gas and electrical systems
  • Internal reconfiguration and layout improvements
  • Construction of new walls, floors and ceilings
  • Staircase reconstruction and installation of new balustrades
  • Installation of modern washroom facilities
  • Fit-out of office rooms, changing areas and kitchen
  • Internal finishing in line with current design standards
  • Full coordination and delivery in line with programme requirements

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed project brought an abandoned building back into productive use, creating a modern office environment with practical, comfortable and well-finished spaces across all seven floors.

constructionProcess.intro: A clear timeline of the Great Portland delivery: initial strip-out, targeted structural and layout changes, new partitions with first-fix MEP, plasterboard and surface preparation, then final fit-out including washrooms, kitchens, flooring and lighting across the refurbished floors.
